sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32504" key="e)kneuro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκνευρ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n32504.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ίζω</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Tab.Defix, Aud.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">234.18</biblScope> </bibl> (Carthage, <date TEIform="date">i A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
